security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:11434 http://127.0.0.1:11434; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first Catholic knowledge base with AI
bundle.longDescription: A sovereign Catholic knowledge base containing Scripture, Catechism, Canon Law, Church Fathers, and Magisterial documents. Features semantic search, AI-powered Q&A, and full source citations. Runs entirely offline.
